title: lotus sanguineus
intro: Lotus sanguineus, also known as the Indian lotus or red lotus, is a species of aquatic plant that belongs to the Nelumbo genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani systems, where its roots and leaves are believed to possess medicinal properties. The roots of the lotus sanguineus plant are said to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain, inflammation, and improve overall health. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, and is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
